sources.name: NSM (Nasjonal sikkerhetsmyndighet)
sources.completeness_note: 98 guidance documents covering 21 Grunnprinsipper for IKT-sikkerhet (v2.1), digital security guidance, NIS2-NO implementation, sikkerhetsloven guidance, risk assessment, incident response

sources.name: NorCERT (Norwegian CERT)
sources.completeness_note: 42 advisories covering critical vulnerabilities, ransomware alerts, and threat assessments with CVE references

sources.name: NSM Framework Series
sources.completeness_note: 10 framework entries including Grunnprinsipper for IKT-sikkerhet, NIS2-NO, nasjonal strategi for digital sikkerhet, sikkerhetsloven guidance

gaps.description: Full original guidance text (only summaries included)
